<!-- you gotta check all the boxes to have your pr accepted -->

# Requirements
<!-- Change each checkbox to [x] (all lowercase, with no spaces between the brackets) to mark it as completed. -->

- [ ] My pull request contains new additions to the list.
- [ ] I have properly added the appropriate credits to the new entry(s). <!-- only the "port by" text, NOT the credits section -->
- [ ] There are not any duplicate ports added, and if there is, I have added a new link to that game. <!-- example: [Nothing}(link), [2](link) -->
- [ ] My entry(s) contain links to the built game files. <!-- no direct links unless said otherwise in the case of closed deployed ports -->
- [ ] I have checked all the boxes. <!-- yeah -->
